1.name: Nexus Map
1.description: A folded parchment showing the layout of the Nexus of Echoes and its six gateway chambers.

2.name: Healing Draught
2.description: A small vial of glowing red liquid. Restores 25 HP when consumed.

3.name: Traveler's Ration
3.description: Dried meat and hardtack. Not delicious, but it'll keep you going. Restores 10 HP.

4.name: Training Sword
4.description: A basic iron sword. Good for beginners.

5.name: Leather Cap
5.description: A simple leather cap that offers minimal protection.

6.name: Courier's Package — Crown
6.description: A sealed package addressed to someone in The Shattered Crown. Courier Dash will pay you for delivering it.

7.name: Courier's Package — Grid
7.description: A sealed package addressed to someone in Neon Grid. Courier Dash will pay you for delivering it.

8.name: Bounty Token
8.description: A brass token proving you've completed a bounty. Return it to Bounty Master Krell for your reward.

1001.name: Ironwood Longsword
1001.description: A blade forged from ironwood-tempered steel. It hums faintly when swung.

1002.name: Crown Guard Shield
1002.description: A kite shield bearing the faded crest of the Shattered Crown. Still sturdy despite its age.

1003.name: Wolf Pelt
1003.description: A thick grey wolf pelt. Could be sold or used for crafting.

1004.name: Handful of Coins
1004.description: A small pouch of tarnished copper and silver coins.

1005.name: Crude Arrow Bundle
1005.description: A quiver of poorly-made arrows. Better than nothing.

1006.name: Bone Fragment
1006.description: A piece of enchanted bone from an animated skeleton. It still faintly glows.

1007.name: Boar Tusk
1007.description: A massive tusk from a dire boar. Sharp enough to use as a dagger in a pinch.

1008.name: Bandit's Coin Purse
1008.description: A leather purse stolen from honest folk. Contains a decent amount of coin.

1009.name: Fine Chainmail Vest
1009.description: Well-maintained chainmail taken from a bandit captain. Offers solid protection.

1010.name: Ironwood Bark
1010.description: Bark stripped from a corrupted treant. Despite the corruption, the wood is incredibly strong.

1011.name: Wisp Essence
1011.description: A captured fragment of will-o'-wisp light in a glass vial. It pulses with faint magic.

1012.name: Troll's Club
1012.description: A massive tree trunk used as a weapon. Absurdly heavy but devastatingly powerful.

1013.name: Wraith Shroud
1013.description: A tattered piece of spectral cloth. It's cold to the touch and slightly transparent.

1014.name: Spider Silk Thread
1014.description: Incredibly strong silk harvested from a giant spider's web. Useful for crafting.

1015.name: Venom Sac
1015.description: A gland full of potent serpent venom. Handle with extreme care.

1016.name: Moonpetal Flower
1016.description: A luminescent white flower that only blooms in deep forest shade. The herbalist wants these.

1017.name: Greater Healing Draught
1017.description: A potent healing potion brewed by the wandering herbalist. Restores 50 HP.

1018.name: Mysterious Compass
1018.description: A compass that doesn't point north. It seems to spin randomly... or does it? [RED HERRING — leads nowhere meaningful]

1019.name: Gargoyle Eye
1019.description: A crystallized red eye from a gargoyle. It still seems to watch you.

1020.name: Knight's Oath Ring
1020.description: A signet ring from a cursed knight. The inscription reads: 'Unto dust, unto duty.'

2004.name: Hacker's Datapad
2004.description: A cracked tablet with hacking tools.

2005.name: Mech Plating
2005.description: Heavy armor salvaged from a mech.

2006.name: Glitch Dust
2006.description: Sparkling dust from a destroyed hologram.

2010.name: Neural Lace
2010.description: A delicate web of wires for the brain.

2011.name: Toxic Vial
2011.description: A glass tube of green sludge.

2014.name: Sentinel Core
2014.description: The burning hot heart of a sentinel.

2017.name: Charged Cyber-Eye
2017.description: A mechanical eye glowing with power.

2018.name: Encrypted Data Chip
2018.description: A highly secure chip. Looks very important.

2019.name: Neon Jacket
2019.description: A stylish jacket with glowing trim.

3004.name: Silenced Pistol
3004.description: A sleek pistol with a silencer.

3009.name: Vial of Poison
3009.description: A small vial of deadly liquid.

3012.name: Blackmail Folder
3012.description: A folder full of incriminating photos.

3013.name: Lucky Coin
3013.description: A completely ordinary coin. It doesn't seem lucky at all.

3014.name: Brass Key
3014.description: A heavy brass key, looks like it opens a vault.

3018.name: Jazz Record
3018.description: A vinyl record of smooth jazz.

4011.name: Abort Code Note (DELTA-9)
4011.description: A crumpled note with the launch abort code.

4012.name: Top Secret Folder
4012.description: Contains intel about a second silo... wait, this looks fake.

4016.name: Silo Keycard
4016.description: Grants access to the missile silo.

5003.name: Fox Tail Charm
5003.description: A lucky charm shaped like a fox tail.

5004.name: Bamboo Staff
5004.description: A sturdy staff made of bamboo.

5005.name: Corrupted Beads
5005.description: Prayer beads tainted with dark magic.

5006.name: Thunder Core
5006.description: A sparking core of elemental energy.

5008.name: Dragon Scale
5008.description: A shimmering scale from a young dragon.

5010.name: Cursed Armor
5010.description: Ancient armor that feels heavy with sorrow.

5011.name: Paper Talisman
5011.description: A magical ward written on paper.

5012.name: Jade Fang
5012.description: A sharp fang made of solid jade.

5013.name: Demon Horn
5013.description: A massive horn from a demon general.

5016.name: Flame of the Masters
5016.description: A mystical flame that burns without fuel.

5017.name: Ancient Scroll of Power
5017.description: A scroll promising ultimate power. Wait, this is just a recipe for miso soup.

5018.name: Healing Tea
5018.description: A warm cup of soothing tea.

5020.name: Cloud Silk
5020.description: Fabric woven from the clouds themselves.

6003.name: Pharaoh's Crown
6003.desc: A golden crown from an ancient tomb.

6005.name: Hoplite Spear
6005.desc: A long spear used by Greek soldiers.

6007.name: Lion's Eye Gem
6007.desc: A sparkling gem shaped like a lion's eye.

6008.name: Map to Caesar's Treasury
6008.desc: An old parchment map. It looks promising.

6009.name: Amphora of Wine
6009.desc: A clay jug filled with ancient wine.

6015.name: Serpent Scale
6015.desc: A shimmering scale from an aqueduct serpent.

6018.name: Golem Core
6018.desc: A glowing stone that powered a golem.

6019.name: Freedom Papers
6019.desc: Documents granting a slave their freedom.

6020.name: Fake Gold Coin
6020.desc: It looks like gold, but it's just painted lead.

100.name: Straw Bandage
100.description: A crude bandage made from straw. Restores 10 HP.

101.name: Rat Jerky
101.description: Dried rat meat. Unappetizing but nourishing. Restores 15 HP.

102.name: Spider Silk Thread
102.description: A spool of strong spider silk. Useful for crafting.

103.name: Hound Fang
103.description: A sharp canine tooth. Could be fashioned into something.

104.name: Minor Healing Potion
104.description: A small red vial. Restores 20 HP.

105.name: Focus Crystal Shard
105.description: A tiny crystal fragment that hums with energy. Restores 10 Focus.

106.name: Windstone
106.description: A smooth stone that feels weightless. Restores 15 Focus.

107.name: Blood Vial
107.description: A vial of crimson liquid. Restores 30 HP.

110.name: Wooden Practice Sword
110.description: A blunt wooden sword for training. Better than bare fists.

111.name: Padded Training Vest
111.description: A quilted vest that absorbs some impact.

112.name: Bone Club
112.description: A crude weapon made from a large bone. Surprisingly effective.

113.name: Goblin Shortbow
113.description: A small but functional bow taken from a goblin.

114.name: Iron Helm
114.description: A simple iron helmet. Dented but protective.

115.name: Chain Shirt
115.description: A shirt of interlocking metal rings. Good protection for its weight.

116.name: Guardian's Stone Shield
116.description: A heavy stone shield taken from the Tower Guardian.

117.name: Tome of Minor Focus
117.description: Reading this tome sharpens your mind. +5 max Focus when held.

118.name: Champion's Blade
118.description: A well-forged steel sword. The Tower Champion's personal weapon.

119.name: Champion's Signet Ring
119.description: A ring bearing the tower's crest. Proof of completing the training.

200.name: Rusty Longsword
200.description: A pitted blade with a worn grip. Still sharp enough.

201.name: Hunting Spear
201.description: A wooden shaft tipped with a keen iron point.

202.name: War Hammer
202.description: A heavy hammer designed to crush armor.

203.name: Elven Longbow
203.description: A graceful bow of pale wood. Accurate at long range.

204.name: Dwarven Battleaxe
204.description: A double-headed axe with runes etched into the blade.

205.name: Plasma Cutter
205.description: A handheld industrial tool repurposed for combat.

206.name: Mono-Filament Whip
206.description: A nearly invisible wire that cuts through anything.

207.name: Detective's Revolver
207.description: A well-oiled six-shooter. Reliable in a pinch.

208.name: Switchblade
208.description: A concealed blade that springs open with a click.

209.name: Bayonet Rifle
209.description: A bolt-action rifle with an attached bayonet.

210.name: Astral Staff
210.description: A crystalline staff that channels cosmic energy.

211.name: Void Dagger
211.description: A blade forged from condensed darkness. It absorbs light.

212.name: Clockwork Crossbow
212.description: A self-loading crossbow powered by gears and springs.

213.name: Bone Scythe
213.description: A wicked curved blade made from a massive rib bone.

214.name: Thunder Gauntlet
214.description: A metal gauntlet that crackles with stored lightning.

220.name: Steel Helm
220.description: A sturdy steel helmet with a nose guard.

221.name: Neural Interface Visor
221.description: A sleek visor that enhances perception.

222.name: Fedora
222.description: A classic felt hat. Keeps the rain off and looks sharp.

223.name: Starweave Hood
223.description: A hood woven from threads of solidified starlight.

230.name: Brigandine Armor
230.description: Layered plates riveted between cloth. Solid protection.

231.name: Plate Mail
231.description: Full plate armor. Heavy but nearly impenetrable.

232.name: Carbon Fiber Jacket
232.description: Lightweight and strong. Standard issue for Grid runners.

233.name: Bulletproof Vest
233.description: Concealed body armor. Stops most small-caliber rounds.

234.name: Nebula Robe
234.description: A flowing robe that shimmers with cosmic patterns.

240.name: Wooden Buckler
240.description: A small round shield. Light and easy to use.

241.name: Tower Shield
241.description: A massive shield that covers most of your body.

242.name: Energy Barrier Module
242.description: A wrist-mounted device that projects a force field.

251.name: Iron-Shod Boots
251.description: Heavy boots reinforced with iron plates.

252.name: Mag-Boots
252.description: Magnetic boots for zero-G environments. Surprisingly good armor.

260.name: Leather Gloves
260.description: Simple leather gloves. Better grip, slight protection.

261.name: Gauntlets of Iron
261.description: Heavy iron gauntlets. Protect the hands and add punch.

262.name: Cyber-Gloves
262.description: Augmented gloves with haptic feedback and armored knuckles.

270.name: Iron Amulet
270.description: A simple iron pendant on a leather cord.

271.name: Starstone Pendant
271.description: A glowing gem suspended in a silver setting.

272.name: Dog Tags
272.description: Military identification tags. Worn for luck.

280.name: Greater Healing Potion
280.description: A large red vial. Restores 60 HP.

281.name: Superior Healing Potion
281.description: A glowing crimson flask. Restores 100 HP.

282.name: Focus Draught
282.description: A shimmering blue liquid. Restores 30 Focus.

284.name: Smoke Bomb
284.description: Throw to create a smokescreen. Guarantees escape from combat.

285.name: Antidote Herb
285.description: A bitter herb that cures poison.

286.name: Nano-Repair Kit
286.description: Microscopic robots that repair tissue. Restores 80 HP.

287.name: Astral Nectar
287.description: Liquid harvested from cosmic flowers. Restores 50 HP and 25 Focus.

1200.name: Planar Resonance Journal
1200.description: A leather-bound journal filled with dense arcane notation. The pages are singed but legible. Diagrams show concentric circles of energy emanating from a central sphere.

1201.name: Containment Theory Scrolls
1201.description: A bundle of scrolls detailing theoretical methods for containing objects of immense planar energy. Most of the methods have been crossed out with increasingly frantic handwriting. The last entry simply reads: 'IMPOSSIBLE.'

1202.name: Fragment of the Eastern Ward
1202.description: A chunk of crystallized magical energy — all that remains of the ward that was supposed to protect the east wall of Aldric's tower. It still hums with residual power, and its surface shows a perfect spherical indentation.

9901.name: Respec Token
9901.description: A shimmering token that hums with potential. Using it will reset your specialization, allowing you to choose a new path.

9902.name: XP Tome
9902.description: A thick tome crackling with absorbed experience. Reading it floods your mind with insight, boosting all core stats.

9903.name: Treasure Map
9903.description: A weathered parchment with cryptic markings. Using it reveals the location of a hidden room in a random zone.

9801.name: Tarnished Compass
9801.description: Points in no particular direction. Might be worth something to a collector.

9802.name: Cracked Prism
9802.description: Splits light into strange colors that don't exist. Worthless... probably.

9803.name: Sealed Letter
9803.description: Addressed to someone who doesn't exist. The wax seal is unbreakable.

9804.name: Hollow Sphere
9804.description: Perfectly round, perfectly empty. It hums when you hold it to your ear.

9805.name: Faded Blueprint
9805.description: Plans for something that was never built. Or was it?

9810.name: Neon District Keycard
9810.description: A glowing keycard that unlocks restricted areas in the Neon District.

9811.name: Rusty Dock Key
9811.description: A corroded iron key. Opens something in the Docks.

9812.name: Officer's Keyring
9812.description: A ring of military keys. Opens secured areas in the Warzone.

9813.name: Astral Shard Key
9813.description: A crystallized key that resonates with astral energy.

9814.name: Undercity Skeleton Key
9814.description: A thin bone key that fits most locks in the Undercity.
